criteriaResults.evidence: Route configured in App.tsx, E2E test passed

criteriaResults.criterion: Members displayed in responsive card grid layout
criteriaResults.evidence: TeamGrid component implements grid, E2E test passed

criteriaResults.criterion: Grid: 1 column mobile, 2 columns tablet, 3 columns desktop
Each card shows: large avatar, name, role, email, online status indicator
criteriaResults.evidence: MemberCard component includes all required fields, E2E test verified

criteriaResults.criterion: Online status: green dot for online, gray dot for offline
criteriaResults.evidence: Avatar component uses bg-green-500 for online, bg-gray-400 for offline
Email rendered as mailto: link with proper styling, E2E test verified

criteriaResults.criterion: Cards have consistent height regardless of content
criteriaResults.evidence: h-full class ensures uniform card heights

criteriaResults.criterion: Cards have hover effect (shadow or border change)
Search input filters members by name (case-insensitive, real-time)
criteriaResults.evidence: useTeamFilter implements case-insensitive search with debounce, E2E test passed

criteriaResults.criterion: Role dropdown filter with options: All, Developer, Designer, Manager
criteriaResults.evidence: TeamFilters includes all required role options, E2E test verified

criteriaResults.criterion: Filters can be combined (search + role together)
criteriaResults.evidence: Logical AND combines both filters, E2E test verified combined filtering

criteriaResults.criterion: Empty state message when no members match filters
criteriaResults.evidence: TeamGrid renders empty state message, E2E test passed

criteriaResults.criterion: Filter state resets on page navigation
criteriaResults.evidence: useState initializes fresh state on component mount

criteriaResults.criterion: Result count shown (e.g., Showing 3 of 8 members)
criteriaResults.evidence: Dynamic count display updates with filtering, E2E tests verified

criteriaResults.criterion: All cards adapt properly to dark mode
criteriaResults.evidence: Comprehensive dark mode classes across all Team page components

criteriaResults.criterion: Required Check - Smoke: App loads without errors
criteriaResults.evidence: All smoke tests passed, no console errors

e2eResults.notes: 8 failures in task-7.1-validation.spec.ts are pre-existing (wrong port configuration), not caused by Task 15

handoff.handoffNotes: All acceptance criteria verified and passing. Implementation follows project patterns with proper TypeScript types, responsive design, comprehensive filtering, and dark mode support. All 5 new E2E tests pass. No regressions introduced. Production-ready.
